name: PracticePanther Legal Practice Management REST API
what_it_does: PracticePanther legal practice management REST API for law firms, solo attorneys, and legal professionals to manage cases, clients, tasks, time tracking, billing, invoicing, payments, and document management — enabling automated legal workflow orchestration, billable hour tracking, client portal management, and trust accounting through PracticePanther's cloud-based legal practice management platform. Enables AI agents to manage case management for matter and case tracking automation, handle contact management for client and opposing counsel contact automation, access time tracking for billable hour entry and timesheet automation, retrieve billing for invoice creation and payment processing automation, manage task management for deadline and workflow task automation, handle document management for legal document storage automation, access calendar for court date and hearing scheduling automation, retrieve trust accounting for IOLTA and client fund management automation, manage expense tracking for case cost and disbursement automation, and integrate PracticePanther with QuickBooks, Stripe, and legal research tools for law firm operations automation.
use_cases: Automating billable time entry and invoice generation for law firm billing automation agents
Managing case deadlines and task workflows for legal matter management automation agents
Processing client payments and trust account transactions for legal accounting automation agents
Synchronizing case contacts and documents for legal CRM automation agents
not_for: Court filing and e-filing (PracticePanther is practice management, not court filing system)
Legal research (PracticePanther is case and billing management, not Westlaw or LexisNexis)
Large enterprise law firms needing complex multi-office workflows (PracticePanther targets small-mid size firms)
best_when: A solo attorney, small law firm, or mid-size legal practice wanting AI agents to automate time tracking, billing, case management, and client communications through PracticePanther's intuitive cloud-based legal practice management platform.
avoid_when: SUBSCRIPTION REQUIRED: PracticePanther API requires active subscription; automated open access assumption creates subscription_required; automated must have PracticePanther account. TRUST ACCOUNTING IS REGULATED: IOLTA trust accounting has strict bar association rules; automated unrestricted fund movement assumption creates trust_accounting_violation; automated must implement proper trust accounting safeguards. MATTER TYPES ARE PRACTICE-SPECIFIC: Case types and custom fields vary by practice area; automated universal matter structure assumption creates missing_custom_fields for practice-specific configurations; automated must query firm's configured matter types. BILLING RULES VARY: Hourly, flat fee, and contingency billing have different rules; automated uniform billing assumption creates incorrect_billing_structure; automated must respect engagement letter billing terms.

auth.notes: PracticePanther uses OAuth2 for legal practice management REST API. REST API with JSON. Miami, FL HQ. Founded 2012. Products: Case Management, Billing, Time Tracking, Client Portal, Trust Accounting, Document Management. Integrations: QuickBooks, Stripe, LawPay, Dropbox, Google Drive. SOC2 compliant. Competes with Clio, MyCase, and Smokeball for small-mid size law firm practice management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial for 30 days; production requires paid subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription per user; Solo, Business, and Enterprise tiers; annual discount available
pricing.notes: Miami FL. Per-user monthly subscription. 30-day trial. Legal tech market. 10,000+ law firms.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; billing and case APIs throttled per subscription plan

known_agent_gotchas: TRUST ACCOUNTING REQUIRES SEPARATE LEDGERS: IOLTA trust funds must be tracked separately from operating funds; automated single-account assumption creates trust_commingling_violation; automated must maintain separate trust and operating account ledgers

TIME ENTRIES HAVE ACTIVITY CODES: Billable time uses activity codes tied to billing rates; automated flat-rate assumption creates incorrect_billing_rate for activity-based billing; automated must use correct activity codes per matter

MATTER STATUS AFFECTS BILLABILITY: Closed matters may not accept new time entries; automated open-matter assumption creates billing_on_closed_matter; automated must check matter status before posting time

INVOICE APPROVAL WORKFLOW: Some firms require partner approval before sending invoices; automated instant-send assumption creates unapproved_invoice_sent; automated must check firm's approval workflow settings

STRIPE INTEGRATION IS SEPARATE: PracticePanther payment processing via Stripe requires separate Stripe configuration; automated built-in payment assumption creates payment_gateway_not_configured; automated must set up Stripe connection separately
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal practice management. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Client confidential data and trust accounting.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal tech. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Attorney-client privileged data and trust funds.
